adapted_content.markdown:
# Launch Notes

MPP now supports **rich drafts** across platforms.

Read the [release notes](https://example.com/release) before publishing.

> Keep platform rules deterministic.

- WeChat keeps HTML.
- Zhihu gets Markdown.

![Cover](https://example.com/assets/cover.png)

中文摘要保持可读。
